body_preview: - Assessment §Structured State Snapshot: state_run_incomplete_count=1, cause "state_incomplete/open_after_SessionStarted" - Day 122 tasks #51 and #52 were reverted because "Evaluator timed out without a verifier verdict" — the evaluator process exited without closing the run lifecycle - scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py is the post-hoc lifecycle closer
expected_evidence: Future structured state snapshots show state_run_incomplete_count = 0 for sessions where the only incomplete runs were evaluator-timeout orphans The trajectory extractor no longer flags lifecycle gaps that are actually evaluator-timeout artifacts Implementation: Read `scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py` to understand the current lifecycle closure logic
title: Make append_terminal_state_events.py robust against evaluator-timeout orphaned runs
